commands.repair_reason: - Two narrow code/test repairs remain in the changed OpenAI OAuth runtime and can be attempted without a product decision.; Needs attention: The diff improves callback cleanup, but malformed token parse errors still expose parser detail from an auth-token response.; Review finding: [P2] Return generic malformed-token JSON errors — extensions/openai/openai-chatgpt-oauth-flow.runtime.ts:174 - [P2] Pass the fake-IP SSR... commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps OpenAI ChatGPT/Codex OAuth token JSON parsing, marks callback responses as closing, destroys tracked callback sockets, and adds focused tests for malformed tokens and browser callback login.

PR surface: Source +49, Tests +109. Total +158 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes at source level: current main directly parses successful token responses with `response.json()` and closes the callback server listener without accepted-socket cleanup; I did not rerun a live OAuth flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - Two narrow code/test repairs remain in the changed OpenAI OAuth runtime and can be attempted without a product decision.
